message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFF5EE
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor white
}

actor "personalAccount" as pA1 at top left
participant browser
participant ArgosNotary as ANotary

pA1 ->> browser : navigate to supplychain\nbrowser shows layout for user's account on this chain\ntogether with all layouts of other users' accounts in one view.\nthe current active layout has an edit button next to it,\neverything else can be viewed but not edited by default. \nThe personal Account also sees their own inactive drafts here too. 
note right: The system displays available options based upon permissions granted via roles assigned during registration process; these include viewing existing records or creating new ones depending upons specific requirements set forth within organizational policies governing access control mechanisms implemented throughout entire infrastructure stack including databases servers firewalls etcetera... 

activate Browser  
Browser <- - Personal_Account_2nd_Instance_From_Left_Side_Of_Diagram_To_Right_Hand_Column_Above_Argus_Notarization_Service_Provider_Inc__ANSP_I_: show_supply_chain()  

deactivate BROWSER   

loop Manage Layouts On Supply Chain(s) For User Accounts With Appropriate Permissions Granted By Role Assignments Made During Registration Process Through Organizational Policies Governing Access Control Mechanisms Implemented Throughout Entire Infrastructure Stack Including Databases Servers Firewalls Etcetera ... Do This Repeatedly Until All Desired Changes Have Been Successfully Applied Across Multiple Instances Of Same Type Object Being Managed Simultaneously Without Conflict Resolution Issues Arising Due To Concurrent Modifications Attempted At Once Over Network Connections Established Between Different Nodes Participating In Distributed Ledger Technology Platform Used Hereunder Which May Include But Is Not Limited Too Hyperledger Fabric Corda Quorum Ethereum Private Chains Such As Those Offered Under Enterprise Solutions Provided By IBM Microsoft Oracle Amazon Web Services Google Cloud Platform Among Others Depending Upon Specific Requirements Set Forth Within Contractual Agreements Entered Into Prior Commencement Date Specified Below And Subject Terms Conditions Outlined Therein Regarding Data Privacy Security Compliance Regulatory Standards Adherence Best Practices Industry Guidelines Recommendations Followed Accordingly So That Maximum Benefit Can Be Derived From Utilizing These Technologies Effectively Efficiently Safely Securely Reliably Consistently Predictably Accurately Timely Cost-Efficient Manner Possible Given Current State Art Available Today Tomorrow Next Year Five Years Down Road Ten Twenty Thirty Forty Fifty Sixty Seventy Eight Ninety Hundred Thousand Million Billion Trillion Quadrillion Quintillion Sextillion Septendecilliard Octodecimillia
